NullPointerException.imports:
from io import BytesIO
import pytest
NullPointerException.reasoning: In Python, the equivalent of a NullPointerException in Java is an AttributeError. This is because Python does not have null values and will raise an AttributeError when you try to access or call something that doesn't exist. In this case, `fastBufferedOutputStream0` is None (because it was initialized with None), so trying to access its `flush()` method raises an AttributeError.
